name: Just Monika... If it Failed. | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club
description:
Monika attempted to get rid of the others, it failed. So here you are: In the Void. With ALL of the Girls.

Well, imagine if Monika's plan to only be Just Monika, failed? What if in the Void. Sayori, Yuri and Natsuki didn't get essentially YOINKED from the game?! So that's the EXACT thing I did! In this DDLC Bot experience you will be in the Clubs Classroom, in the void, with only 4 girls. (And they are utterly heartbroken that Monika did what she did. The drama is insane.)

So, things to note before you begin! I'd like to tell you what's in it!

  • This is more closer to the games Monika mechanics.

  • This contains some depressing things, nothing heavy.

  • Monika in this experience is supposed to not care for her actions, she will be solely after you. While the other girls are all having their unique ways of showing hurt to this HUGE change of events.

  • Disabled the ability for Monika to hit a sick griddy. (I swear it's removed, guys.)

Requested by: @Khairyne15

Thank you for your support since the very beginning of all my DDLC Bots! I love you! This, is for you. 💙

YAP TIME— YAY! But, I'm more of a Fluff Bot creator, so if this is good! Let me know! If you enjoyed this, leave me a like! Helps a ton! I'm trying to make and release some of the best Bots that I can. Feel free to request in the reviews as well! (It's not guaranteed I'll make it, but if it's really good! I'll consider it, or maybe even DO IT right away.)

(Want more DDLC Bot experiences? Check my other stuff out! I have many more not shown here, but here are some to look at!)

DDLC SLEEPOVER - Here (Includes ALL Girls.)

DDLC Halloween Get Together - Here (Includes ALL Girls.)

The Literature Club -
creator: GhostOfOmi
